top_signals.title: India’s Russian Oil Boom Outlives the Hormuz Shock
top_signals.summary: Indian crude imports set several records in June. Total inflows reached about 5 million b/d, the highest level ever recorded for the month. Of that, 2.6 million b/d came from Russia, equivalent to 54% of India’s total crude imports and a historic record for Russian-Indian trade. Russian supplies, which had fallen to around 1.1 million b/d in February under sanctions pressure from Washington, more than doubled within four months and became a key pillar of India’s energy-security strategy. India’s overall import volume suggests…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Crypto enters Q3 with thinner liquidity but less leverage after Q2 reset: Talos
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin and Ether open interest fell sharply after $8.35 billion in long liquidations, while ETF outflows, weaker Strategy purchases and declining market depth reduced liquidity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: South32 sells nearly all its aluminum business to Alcoa for $5.6B
top_signals.summary: The sale, says South32, allows the company to slim down its business to focus on the "high-margin copper, zinc, silver and lead operations".
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Koryx Copper wins analyst support after Namibia assays
top_signals.summary: The updated resource supports a larger operation, BMO mining analyst says.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Where To Invest $100,000
top_signals.summary: If you had a sudden six-figure windfall, where should you invest it? Bloomberg asked top wealth advisers where they would put $100,000 (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: PH7 secures C$5M from Natural Resources Canada for copper extraction technology
top_signals.summary: Tech will trial at Gibraltar mine in British Columbia, Canada’s second largest open-pit copper operation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: AI disputes are turning into deals
top_signals.summary: Lawyer by day, rapper by night, Nick Eziefula has seen both sides of the coin when it comes to disputes over AI and art.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
